examples:
Command Example
#
#### Human Readable Output
### wildfire-upload-url
***
Uploads a URL of a webpage to WildFire for analysis.
Notice: Submitting indicators using this command might make the indicator data publicly available. See the vendor’s documentation for more details.
#### Base Command

#### Command Example
```!wildfire-upload-url upload=https://www.XSOAR.com```
#### Human Readable Output
>### WildFire Upload URL
>
>|MD5|SHA256|Status|URL|
>|---|---|---|---|
>| 67632f32e6af123aa8ffd1fe8765a783 | c51a8231d1be07a2545ac99e86a25c5d68f88380b7ebf7ac91501661e6d678bb | Pending | https://www.XSOAR.com |

#### Command Example
```!wildfire-get-sample sha256=afe6b95ad95bc689c356f34ec8d9094c495e4af57c932ac413b65ef132063acc```
#### Human Readable Output
There is no human-readable output for this command.
### wildfire-get-url-webartifacts
***
Get web artifacts for a URL webpage. An empty tgz will be returned, no matter what the verdict, or even if the URL is malformed.
Notice: Submitting indicators using this command might make the indicator data publicly available. See the vendor’s documentation for more details.

#### Command Example
```!wildfire-get-url-webartifacts url=http://royalmail-login.com```
#### Human Readable Output
There is no human-readable output for this command.

outputs.description: MD5 hash of the file. WildFire.Verdicts.SHA256 SHA256 hash of the file.
outputs.name: WildFire.Verdicts.MD5

outputs.description: Verdict of the file. WildFire.Verdicts.VerdictDescription Description of the file verdict.
outputs.name: WildFire.Verdicts.Verdict

outputs.description: The indicator that was tested. DBotScore.Type The indicator type.
outputs.name: DBotScore.Indicator

outputs.description: Vendor used to calculate the score. DBotScore.Score The actual score.
outputs.name: DBotScore.Vendor
